name: mojo-bitcast-uaf-blog-and-ci-fix
description: Debug Mojo UnsafePointer.bitcast use-after-free, create blog PR on separate branch, fix CI failures from gitignore and test coverage hooks. Use when: (1) Mojo crashes in libKGEN after allocation churn with bitcast writes, (2) need to create documentation PR on separate branch while fix branch is active, (3) test_*.mojo artifacts trigger validate-test-coverage hook.
